name: Secondary Behavioral Phenotyping
preprompt: If included, specify a Barnes maze protocol for assessing spatial learning and memory in surviving mice at a defined timepoint. Include apparatus, habituation, cueing, trial structure, outcome measures, and criteria for interpreting cognitive performance.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Optional secondary outcome to assess whether treatment affects cognition alongside lifespan. Useful if the study wants functional aging readouts beyond survival.
